content.value: To ask 'why', use 點解 (dim2 gaai2). To answer, start your sentence with 因為 (jan1 wai6), which means 'because'.

lines.speaker: A
lines.cantonese: 你點解今日唔去公司呀？
lines.romanization: nei5 dim2 gaai2 gam1 jat6 m4 heoi3 gung1 si1 aa3?
lines.translation: Why aren't you going to the office today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.cantonese: 因為我今日喺屋企做嘢。
lines.romanization: jan1 wai6 ngo5 gam1 jat6 hai2 uk1 kei2 zou6 je5.
lines.translation: Because I'm working at home today.

pages.title: Reasoning Mastered!
pages.summary: You can now ask for reasons and explain your actions using 'because'.
